Possibly reference to "Sooti Vayu" (Air push) in the above
sloka and similar one might have helped to strengthen the
belief on "necessity of Air Tatva rise for birth to take place".
A majority of astrologers believe that, to provide the "pushing
force" and "pushing tendency" (to mother) the rise of Air
tatva is a must.
If birth time provided by the native or his parents is not in
Air tatva or in Air Antara tatva, astrologer will consider birth
time as incorrect and make necessary adjustments to move it
to the nearest .Air tatva or Air An tara tatva. 1 don't know
whether it is acceptable to change the given birth time just to
prove the theory, before the theories themselves are proved.
But for sure, this is one of the methods followed by many
astrologers today.l will clarify this method ofBT rectification
with an example.
Question: On 15-8-1995 at 2:55 PM a child is born at
Trivandrum, Kerala, India. Sunrise- 6:18AM (1ST), Sunset-
6:35 PM (1ST).
